ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get your auth token from Beeminder.
ast.target: 从 Beeminder 获取您的身份验证令牌。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select or create a secret in the Obsidian keychain.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 密钥链中选择或创建一个密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Checks the token and caches your goal list for autocomplete.
ast.target: 验证令牌并缓存您的目标列表以供自动完成。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many typed characters are required before text-based goal suggestions appear. Set to 0 to show suggestions immediately on task lines.
ast.target: 在基于文本的目标建议出现之前需要输入的字符数。设置为 0 可在任务行上立即显示建议。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a notice when datapoints are synced or removed.
ast.target: 当数据点被同步或移除时显示通知。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Validate Beeminder token and refresh goals
ast.target: 验证 Beeminder 令牌并刷新目标

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自动完成最小匹配长度

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cursor must be on a task line.
ast.target: 光标必须位于任务行上。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This task already has a Beeminder marker.
ast.target: 此任务已有 Beeminder 标记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Validate your Beeminder token in settings before syncing.
ast.target: 在同步之前，请在设置中验证您的 Beeminder 令牌。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Add a 🐝 annotation to any task to send a datapoint when that task is completed.
ast.target: 在任何任务上添加 🐝 注释，当该任务完成时发送一个数据点。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Use =number to send a custom value instead of the default +1.
ast.target: 使用 =number 发送自定义值，而不是默认的 +1。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Place 🐝 before trailing Tasks metadata so the annotation is parsed correctly.
ast.target: 将 🐝 放在尾部任务元数据之前，以便正确解析注释。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Type "🐝", "bee", or "goal" on a task line to get suggestions from your cached goals.
ast.target: 在任务行上输入 \"🐝\"、\"bee\" 或 \"goal\" 以从缓存的目标中获取建议。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Unchecking a synced task removes the corresponding datapoint from Beeminder.
ast.target: 取消选中已同步的任务会从 Beeminder 中移除相应的数据点。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Insert Beeminder marker on current task
ast.target: 在当前任务上插入 Beeminder 标记
